DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided alternate procedures are used.

Note.Para: Any portion of the system which operates normally may be used.

OperationProcedure.Para: Prior to flight, the pilot-in-command should review the emergency passenger evacuation procedure with all the cabin crew members. The primary means of initiating an emergency passenger evacuation shall be via the use of Passenger Address and/or Cabin Interphone System. Once the emergency passenger evacuation procedure has been initiated from the flight deck, the Purser shall use the Passenger Address, and/or Cabin Interphone System to carry out the evacuation.
